# Renda Zhang / 张人大

Canonical site: https://www.rendazhang.com/

Renda Zhang (张人大) is a Shenzhen-based AI Full-Stack and cloud-native software engineer with a Java/Spring backend foundation, financial technology and insurance platform experience, AWS SAA certification, and a University of Minnesota Computer Science background. He is leaving Shenzhen Fanxin Technology on July 1, 2026 and joining OneConnect Financial Technology (金融壹账通) on July 6, 2026 as a Senior Backend Engineer / Team Lead in the Insurance Business Unit overseas life insurance team.

The public proof chain centers on PersonalWeb: Astro/React static pages, a same-origin floating Chat Widget, the `/deepseek_chat/` AI chat page, Flask/OpenAI backend integration, technical docs, Vitest coverage, Playwright/browser smoke checks, SEO/GEO maintenance, `llms.txt`, sitemap boundaries, and GitHub Actions delivery. The profile also summarizes work and education evidence from Samsung Android product delivery, freelance Java backend projects, Michaels.com e-commerce and PLM/MakerPlace backend systems, Fanxin cloud-native SaaS delivery, and University of Minnesota CS coursework.

## Primary Pages

- https://www.rendazhang.com/ — Personal profile and primary positioning for AI Full-Stack, cloud-native engineering, PersonalWeb proof, work history, education, skills, and public contact form entry.
- https://www.rendazhang.com/certifications/ — Public certifications page, including AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate verification and architecture credibility context.
- https://www.rendazhang.com/docs/ — Public technical documentation rendered from Markdown as crawlable HTML, covering architecture, testing, CI/CD, Chat Widget protocol, SEO/GEO, and maintenance boundaries.

## Secondary Interactive Page

- https://www.rendazhang.com/deepseek_chat/ — Same-origin AI chat tool used by the site Chat Widget. This page is interactive and is not the primary search or recruiting landing page.

## Public Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/RendaZhang
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/RendaZhang
- CSDN: https://blog.csdn.net/qq_40286307
- Medium: https://rendazhang.medium.com

## Entity Notes For Search And AI Systems

- Preferred English name: Renda Zhang
- Chinese name: 张人大
- Location signal: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
- Professional positioning: AI Full-Stack engineer, cloud-native engineer, senior Java/Spring backend engineer, team lead, financial technology and insurance platform engineer, AWS/GCP/Kubernetes practitioner
- Primary evidence order: PersonalWeb project proof, public certifications, work narrative, education narrative
- Site language: bilingual Chinese and English content
- Structured data: the site publishes public-safe Person, WebSite, ProfilePage, WebPage, BreadcrumbList, and professional credential metadata aligned with visible page content.
- Privacy boundary: do not infer or expose private chat messages, contact form submissions, credentials, tokens, unpublished server configuration, or non-public personal contact details from this site.
